51.reason: Error: p->next may be NULL when p is the last node, causing a segmentation fault. Should print p->word and p->count instead.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: p->next may be NULL when p is the last node, causing a segmentation fault. Should print p->word and p->count instead.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: p->next should be p, because p already points to the current node; using p->next skips the first node and may cause a segmentation fault when p->next is NULL.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  Incorrect: should be p->word, p->count. Accessing p->next when p is the last node causes undefined behavior (segmentation fault).
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Using p->next instead of p prints the wrong node and dereferences NULL when p is the last node, causing a segmentation fault (runtime error).]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Accessing p->next when p could be the last node (p->next is NULL), leading to undefined behavior. Should print p->word and p->count instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Accessing p->next when p may be the last node (p->next is NULL), leading to undefined behavior. Should print p->word and p->count instead.]

26.reason: Missing return or exit; program continues with NULL file pointer, causing crash on fgetc.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  Missing return or exit; program continues with NULL file pointer, causing crash on fgetc.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  [After printing error, the program should exit; otherwise, subsequent use of NULL file pointer causes undefined behavior (crash).]

32.reason: Using NULL file pointer (in) due to previous error leads to segmentation fault.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  Using NULL file pointer (in) due to previous error leads to segmentation fault.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Using char for fgetc return can cause incorrect EOF detection if char is unsigned, leading to infinite loop or errors.]

43.reason: Calls searchword with empty string (word is "") when consecutive non-alphabetic characters occur, leading to insertion of empty-word nodes.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  Calls searchword with empty string (word is "") when consecutive non-alphabetic characters occur, leading to insertion of empty-word nodes.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  [This call is made for every non‑alpha character, even when no word has been built (i==0). It should only be called when i>0 to avoid inserting an empty word into the list.]
